The testers on the Windows team were\\going through various popular applications, testing them to make sure they\\worked OK, but SimCity kept crashing. DiMarco finished second after a three-man, three-hole playoff and Riley was fourth  #151; good enough to knock Jay Haas and Steve Flesch out of the top 10 in the Ryder Cup point standings."}
